languages.text: "Блюститель, ты умер мучеником, а восстал героем. Умереть ради Императора — достойно, но жить ради него, несмотря ни на что — вот настоящий подвиг. Приказываю тебе жить!"
"Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"
languages.original_text: "Блюститель, ты умер мучеником, а восстал героем. Умереть ради Императора — достойно, но жить ради него, несмотря ни на что — вот настоящий подвиг. Приказываю тебе жить!"

traits.locale_text: "Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"
"Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"
"Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"

languages.text: 「執行官、あなたは殉教者として死んで英雄として生まれた。天皇のために死ぬことは名誉なことだが、あらゆる困難を乗り越えて天皇のために生きるこそが真の功績である。君に命じる、生きろ！」
languages.original_text: "Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"

traits.locale_text: 「執行官、あなたは殉教者として死んで英雄として生まれた。天皇のために死ぬことは名誉なことだが、あらゆる困難を乗り越えて天皇のために生きるこそが真の功績である。君に命じる、生きろ！」

languages.text: “执法者，你死时是烈士，重生后是英雄。为帝皇而死是光荣的，但为祂排除万难地活下去，才是真正的成就。我命令你活着！”
languages.original_text: "Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"

traits.locale_text: “执法者，你死时是烈士，重生后是英雄。为帝皇而死是光荣的，但为祂排除万难地活下去，才是真正的成就。我命令你活着！”

languages.text: « Prévôt, vous avez péri en martyr et êtes revenu à la vie en héros. S'il est honorable de mourir pour l'Empereur, il n'existe pas de plus grand exploit que de vivre pour Lui après avoir triomphé de la mort. Je vous ordonne de vivre ! »
languages.original_text: "Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"

traits.locale_text: « Prévôt, vous avez péri en martyr et êtes revenu à la vie en héros. S'il est honorable de mourir pour l'Empereur, il n'existe pas de plus grand exploit que de vivre pour Lui après avoir triomphé de la mort. Je vous ordonne de vivre ! »

languages.text: «Guardia, murió como mártir y se ha alzado como héroe. Morir por el Emperador es honorable, pero vivir por Él contra todo pronóstico es una verdadera proeza. ¡Le ordeno que viva!».
languages.original_text: "Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"

traits.locale_text: «Guardia, murió como mártir y se ha alzado como héroe. Morir por el Emperador es honorable, pero vivir por Él contra todo pronóstico es una verdadera proeza. ¡Le ordeno que viva!».

languages.text: "İnfazcı, şehit olarak öldün ve kahraman olarak dirildin. İmparator için ölmek bir şeref olsa da her şeye rağmen O'nun için yaşamak asıl başarıdır. Sana yaşamanı emrediyorum!"
languages.original_text: "Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"

traits.locale_text: "İnfazcı, şehit olarak öldün ve kahraman olarak dirildin. İmparator için ölmek bir şeref olsa da her şeye rağmen O'nun için yaşamak asıl başarıdır. Sana yaşamanı emrediyorum!"

languages.text: "Enforcer, Ihr seid als Märtyrer gestorben und als Held auferstanden. Für den Imperator zu sterben, ist ehrenhaft, aber gegen alle Schwierigkeiten für Ihn zu leben, ist die eigentliche Leistung. Ich befehle Euch, zu leben!"
languages.original_text: "Enforcer, you died a martyr and rose a hero. Dying for the Emperor is honourable, but living for Him against all odds is the true accomplishment. I command you to live!"

traits.locale_text: "Enforcer, Ihr seid als Märtyrer gestorben und als Held auferstanden. Für den Imperator zu sterben, ist ehrenhaft, aber gegen alle Schwierigkeiten für Ihn zu leben, ist die eigentliche Leistung. Ich befehle Euch, zu leben!"
